title: Structuring CodeGrind Learning Paths Without Turning DSA Into a Content Dump
summary: How I structure CodeGrind learning paths around DSA progression, scoring pressure, AI limits, and gameplay loops instead of dumping random problems.

social.bluesky_text: Structuring CodeGrind learning paths around DSA progression, AI limits, and gameplay loops—not endless problem dumps. Learn how we design steps that balance cognitive load, feedback, and challenges. https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/07/06/codegrind-learning-path-structure/

reddit_profile.text: I’ve been refining CodeGrind’s approach to DSA practice by designing learning paths that balance difficulty, feedback, AI use, and gameplay progression. It’s not just about listing problems—it's about creating a structured progression. Details: https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/07/06/codegrind-learning-path-structure/
